rationale_overall: The watchlist is full at 8/8 and all positions maintain intact theses as of March 31, 2025. The January 27 DeepSeek shock (NVDA -17% intraday) was the quarter's main AI stress test; it resolved without thesis damage — NVDA Q4 FY2025 (Feb 26) showed data-center revenue $35.6B up 93% YoY and confirmed the Blackwell ramp, MSFT FY2025 Q2 (Jan 29) showed its AI business at a $13B+ run rate growing 175% YoY, and GOOGL Q4 2024 (Feb 4-5) confirmed 30% Google Cloud growth with Gemini 2.0 integrated. Quantum: IONQ beat FY2024 with $43.1M revenue (+95% YoY), $95.6M bookings, a $21.1M AFRL contract, and a definitive agreement to acquire ID Quantique (Feb 26). Rockets: RKLB reported Q4 2024 record revenue $132.4M, FY2024 $436.2M (Feb 27). Nuclear: CEG holds the Microsoft TMI-restart PPA as its anchor; NUKZ provides diversified nuclear-basket coverage distinct from CEG. Robotics: BOTZ supported by a broad wave of humanoid/industrial-robotics venture funding in early 2025. The defense/rearmament wave would be the natural next add, but the profile warns defense primes have already re-rated sharply and no pre-April 2025 catalyst justifies displacing an intact holding. No changes.
